'''Energizer Stick''' is an item that gives your dog:

{{Item
| image = Energizer stick.png
| id = energizer_stick
| type = Utilities
| Properties = Gives your dog Glowing, Speed and Regeneration
| stackable = 64
}}
* '''Glowing''' for 5 seconds.
* '''Speed VII''' for 10 seconds.
* '''Regeneration III''' for 5 seconds.
== Obtaining ==
=== Crafting ===
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Ingredients
! Recipe
|-
| Wheat <br>+ Sugar
| [[File:Energizer stick crafting.gif]]
|}

== Usage ==
* '''<code>Right click</code>''' on your dog to use the item.
'''Note:'''
* While giving it to your good boy, make sure he's sitting, because the &quot;sugar rush&quot; might put him in danger.
* '''Tip:''' While in sticky situations, if you have yourself a [[Wolf Mount]] nearby, use an '''Energizer Stick''' to quickly escape!

== Trivia ==

* It was originally called [[Chew Stick]].
